summary: Bug Fix Testing Complete - All Search and Filter functionality on /en/explore page working correctly. Desktop & Mobile tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ExplorePage.jsx properly implements client-side filtering with combined search + dish type + continent filters
Filter bar correctly hidden on continent/country sub-pages (/en/explore/europe)
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements (explore-search-input, filter-dish-type, filter-continent, filter-option-*, clear-all-filters, clear-search-tag, recipe-count)
Mobile responsive design works correctly with full filter functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Search and Filter bug fix verified. Total recipes: 161. Dish type counts: dessert=22, main-course varies. Continent counts: Europe=129, Asia=18, Americas=11, Africa=2, Oceania=1. All filters work client-side with combined filtering.

verified_features.feature: Search input on /en/explore filters by recipe name
Search input filters by country name
verified_features.details: Search 'mexico' returns 2 recipes (Mexican recipes like Mole Poblano, Tacos al Pastor)
Search 'pasta' + continent 'Europe' shows 2 results (Pasta alla Genovese, Pasta e patate alla napoletana)
Dish type 'dessert' + continent 'Europe' shows 20 European desserts (less than 22 total desserts)
Resets all filters and shows all 161 recipes
Search input visible and works on 390x844 viewport
Dish Type dropdown opens and selections work on mobile
Continent dropdown opens and selections work on mobile
Shows continent countries page correctly with 'Countries in Europe' section (Spain 74, Italy 42, France 5, etc.)
Individual filter tags can be removed by clicking X, and Clear All removes all filters
